  "summary": "CollabSync is a real-time collaborative editing platform built on a microservices architecture with strong consistency guarantees using CRDTs. It supports rich-text, spreadsheets, and whiteboards with sub-100ms latency, 99.99% availability, and 11 nines durability. The system uses Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Redis, S3, and Apache Pulsar, with comprehensive observability via OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, and structured logging. Security, scalability, and disaster recovery are first-class concerns, with active-active multi-region deployment and automated failover."
